channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: UAE to take center stage in AI Innovation with the launch of Dubai AI Week
item.description: The UAE’s vision for AI is encapsulated in its National AI Strategy 2031, which aims to position the country as a global leader in AI by integrating it across various sectors.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Solidigm exits consumer SSD market as it prepares to go very big on enterprise SSDs in 2025
item.description: Solidigm's exit from consumer SSDs marks a significant shift, as it pivots towards enterprise storage.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: The 11 most exciting tech trends of 2025, according to CES 2025
item.description: CES 2025 is packed with futuristic tech, but these are the 11 trends that'll have the biggest impact on our gadget lives in 2025.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: TikTok's Sister App CapCut Faces Uncertainty Amid US Supreme Court Ruling - Digital Video Editing Tools Feel the Heat
item.description: As TikTok pleads with the U.S. Supreme Court to let it continue operating in the United States, another video-editing tool made by ByteDance parent company faces uncertainty and its users may switch to alternative tools like Captions, a smaller AI-powered technology provider offering free editing software.
item.dc:creator: Scott Nover, Fast Company

item.title: Prime Video's use of AI, Next Gen Stats on NFL games is helping viewers understand the game better
item.description: CULVER CITY, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams defense appeared to be content to drop back in coverage and prevent San Francisco’s Brock Purdy from completing a Hail Mary on the final play of their Thursday night game on Dec. 12. The broadcast on Amazon Prime Video saw it differently, though.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Oracle offers price-performance boost with Exadata X11M update
item.description: The new version of Oracle’s Exadata platform, X11M, is now generally available, and promises improved performance on generative AI tasks such as retrieval augmented generation (RAG) for the same price as the old version.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Japan links Chinese hacker MirrorFace to dozens of cyberattacks targeting security and tech data
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan on Wednesday linked more than 200 cyberattacks over the past five years targeting the country's national security and high technology data to a Chinese hacking group, MirrorFace, detailing their tactics and calling on government agencies and businesses to reinforce preventive meas
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 6 swift steps for a faster Android experience
item.description: Well, I’ll be: It’s a new year! Already. Somehow. I think. (For full disclosure, I’m still at least 77% asleep from my traditional end-of-year hibernation/hiatus. Kindly forgive any mid-sentence snores or nonsensical outbursts.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Intro to Ktor: The HTTP server for Kotlin
item.description: Kotlin is a modern general-purpose language that brings together object-oriented and functional programming power in a sleek syntax. Ktor is the official HTTP server for Kotlin, leveraging Kotlin’s expressiveness for building endpoints and other server-side necessities.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Meta eliminates fact-checking in latest bow to Trump
item.description: Meta chief executive officer Mark Zuckerberg on Tuesday announced changes to content moderation on Facebook and Instagram long sought by conservatives. Incoming President Donald Trump said the new approach was “probably” due to threats he made against the technology mogul.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, BARBARA ORTUTAY and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Nvidia's new GPU series led an avalanche of entertainment-related announcements at CES
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — In a packed Las Vegas arena, Nvidia founder Jensen Huang stood on stage and marveled over the crisp real-time computer graphics displayed on the screen behind him.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Gleam 1.7 brings faster record updates
item.description: Gleam 1.7 has arrived with faster record updates and a dynamic coder for a custom type. Overall, the latest version of Gleam touts performance and package publishing improvements. This latest update to Gleam was announced January 5 and is accessible from GitHub.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Restore Deleted Contacts on iPhone or Android: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to restore deleted contacts on your iPhone or Android device using iCloud, iTunes Backup, Google Contacts, or Device settings. Follow these easy steps to rectify the situation quickly and practice safe data hygiene.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Agentic AI: The top challenges and how to overcome them
item.description: As generative AI continues to surge in popularity, we are already seeing it evolve into the next generation of machine-learning-driven technology: agentic AI. With agentic AI, we are not just prompting models and receiving an answer in a simple one-step process.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 5 ways data teams must lead in AI-driven organizations
item.description: Generative AI has inspired a surge of interest in using data to improve the accuracy of business decisions.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cybertruck tracking in Las Vegas case raises privacy concerns
item.description: Elon Musk commented on the explosion shortly after it happened, saying it was not an issue with the Cybertruck itself.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg denies claims of building doomsday bunker in Hawaii
item.description: "I think it got blown out of proportion as if the whole ranch was some kind of doomsday bunker," Zuckerberg said.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Delandro, NewsNation

item.title: Fubo combining with Disney's Hulu + Live TV; lawsuit against Venu Sports settled
item.description: Disney's Hulu + Live TV and sports streaming service Fubo are combining in a deal that will also see the settlement of a lawsuit against the creation of Venu Sports.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 2025 ransomware predictions, trends, and how to prepare
item.description: Zscaler ThreatLabz research team has revealed critical insights and predictions on ransomware trends for 2025. The latest Ransomware Report uncovered a surge in sophisticated tactics and extortion attacks.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Demand for AI skills soars, while demand for programming skills falls – O’Reilly report
item.description: It’s perhaps not a surprise, but demand for AI-related skills has soared, according to technology educator O’Reilly, which just released its annual technology trends report. By contrast, interest in programming languages Python and Java has taken a bit of a nosedive, the company reports.
item.dc:creator: Info World
